entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop studied, Cajanus cajan (L.) Mill sp.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The measure of diversity in genetic makeup among genotypes

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation due to genetic factors

entities.name: GENETIC ADVANCE
entities.description: The expected genetic gain from selection

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: Statistical method used to reveal differences among genotypes

entities.name: PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of pods produced per plant

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced per plant

entities.name: PRIMARY BRANCHES PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of primary branches per plant

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The time taken for 50% of the plants to flower

entities.name: TEST WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of a specific number of seeds

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical height of the plant

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE EFFECT
entities.description: The cumulative effect of individual alleles on a trait

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC SELECTION
entities.description: Selection based on the observable characteristics of the plant
